channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Elon Musk clarifies viral Tesla Cybertruck accident with driver logs  Teslarati
  2. Lone survivor of fiery Cybertruck crash was trapped by electronic doors, lawsuit says  Los Angeles Times
  3. Sole survivor of Piedmont Cybertruck crash latest to sue Tesla over door design  KTVU
  4. Video shows Cybertruck nearly drive mom and baby off overpass: lawsuit  Fox Business
  5. Tesla Is Sued by Survivor of Deadly California Cybertruck Crash  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Iran war underscores risks of Trump’s relentless focus on oil - AP News
item.description:
1. Iran war underscores risks of Trump’s relentless focus on oil  AP News
  2. Trump’s war will boost the clean energy sector he despises  Financial Times
  3. Exclusive | Oil Industry Warns Trump Administration That Fuel Crunch Will Likely Worsen  WSJ
  4. The Iran War Is Another Reason to Quit Oil  The New Yorker
  5. For the Same Cost as Another Mideast War, We Could Make Oil Irrelevant  The New Republic
